title: Chhabra 555 Blue Poly Georgette Dyed Leheriya Saree
description: Design Detail:Blue leheriya  dyed saree and has a zari border Blouse PieceThe model is wearing a blouse from our stylists collection, see the image for a mock-up of what the actual blouse would look likeOrigin:Leheriya sarees originated from the state of Rajasthan, India. The cloth is tied and folded in such a manner that when opened post-dyeing, there is a striped pattern created on the cloth with color on every alternate stripe.Pattern Detail:Bandhani is an art that involves dyeing a fabric tied tightly with a thread at several points, producing a variety of patterns.

title: Saree mall Pink & Green Printed Bhagalpuri Saree
description: Design Detail:Pink and Green bhagalpuri printed saree and has a solid border with tasselled detailBlouse PieceThe model is wearing a blouse from our stylists collection, see the image for a mock-up of what the actual blouse would look likeOrigin:Bhagalpuri sarees have the finest texture of silk springing out from the essence of nature. Known for the unique and striking resilience and superior quality, these are filled with every slice of Indian cultural aspects which are drawn from the intricacies of the natural surroundings.Fabric:Art silk is manufactured by synthetic fibres like rayon. It's light in weight and is soft on the skin for comfort in summers.
